untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'confirmation_bars' (N consecutive closes beyond breakout level) which cannot be expressed with single-bar indicator comparisons. The backtest engine would need multi-bar lookback logic or a custom 'consecutive_closes' indicator not in the allowed list. Additionally, 'lookback_period' parameter is referenced but not quantified in the signal.
translation_notes: Interpreted pattern breakout using Donchian Channel extremes (dc_upper/dc_lower) as resistance/support proxies. Volume confirmation mapped to vol_ratio_20 > 1.5x baseline. Reversal exits use opposing Donchian levels. However, the core requirement (N consecutive confirmation closes) is untranslatable with allowed operators. Recommend implementing a custom 'consecutive_closes_beyond_level' indicator or using a rolling confirmation counter in backtest logic.
